Rules.InvariantScript: Filter(CRUserAdmin, IsBlank(txtSearchUAS.Text) Or txtSearchUAS.Text in Title)

Switch(ThisItem.Role.Value,
  "Admin", RGBA(192,57,43,1),
  "PMO", RGBA(31,55,100,1),
  "Programme Manager", RGBA(31,55,100,1),
  RGBA(39,174,96,1)
)

/*
  User Admin Screen — OnVisible
  Purpose: User role and group management. Restricted to Admin role only.
  Author:  IAG Tech Developer
  Date:    07 Apr 2026
*/
// Guard: redirect non-admin users immediately.
If(Not(gblIsAdmin), Navigate('Home Screen', ScreenTransition.None))
